subject: feat(builder): add page-level conditional logic configuration
body:
When no field is selected, the right panel now shows page settings with
a ConditionBuilder for conditional page visibility. Generalized
ConditionBuilder to accept both field and page targets via generic props
(conditions, targetId, targetType). Added amber dot indicator on page
tabs that have conditions. First page is guarded — conditions disabled
with explanatory message.

Tags: conditional-logic, builder, ui, pages
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: conditional-logic
Semver: minor

title: add page-level conditional logic configuration
